name: calendar
description: Built-in Firebat calendar — JSONL file (data/calendar/events.jsonl). No external sync (by design). Chains naturally with other sysmods (cron, notes, trading) — link calendar events to cron jobs via linkedJobId for two-way tracking.

action.description: list-upcoming=next N days from today (default 7), list-range=fromTm~toTm range, add=new event (id auto-generated), update=patch fields by id, delete=soft-delete by id (records deletedAt), find=search title/description/tags

id.description: [update/delete] Event ID (returned by the add action).

endAt.description: [add/update] End time ISO (optional). If omitted, defaults to startAt + 1 hour

description.description: [add/update] Detailed notes (optional). Free-form text for IPO allocation info, trading notes, etc.

tags.description: [add/update] Tags (free-form strings). Used by find filters

linkedJobId.description: [add/update] Linked cron job ID — enables two-way tracking between events and cron jobs. After AI registers a cron via schedule_task, pass the returned jobId here so that updating or deleting the event also cleans up the cron

items.description: Results of list-* / find (id, title, startAt, endAt, tags, linkedJobId, ...)
